en: Now when Jesus had finished these sayings, he went away from Galilee and entered the region of Judea beyond the Jordan.
zh: 耶穌講完了這些話，就離開加利利，來到約旦河東的猶太境內。

en: And large crowds followed him, and he healed them there.
zh: 有許多人跟著他；他在那裡醫好了他們。

en: And Pharisees came up to him and tested him by asking, "Is it lawful to divorce one's wife for any cause?"
zh: 法利賽人前來試探耶穌，說：“人根據某些理由休妻，可以嗎？”

en: He answered, "Have you not read that he who created them from the beginning made them male and female,
zh: 他回答：“造物者從起初‘造人的時候，就造男造女’。‘因此人要離開父母，與妻子連合，二人成為一體。’這些話你們沒有念過嗎？

en: and said, 'Therefore a man shall leave his father and his mother and hold fast to his wife, and they shall become one flesh'?
So they are no longer two but one flesh. What therefore God has joined together, let not man separate."
zh: 這樣，他們不再是兩個人，而是一體的了。所以 神 所配合的，人不可分開。”

en: They said to him, "Why then did Moses command one to give a certificate of divorce and to send her away?"
zh: 他們就問：“為甚麼摩西卻吩咐‘人若給了休書，就可以休妻’呢？”

en: He said to them, "Because of your hardness of heart Moses allowed you to divorce your wives, but from the beginning it was not so.
zh: 他說：“摩西因為你們的心硬，才准許你們休妻，但起初並不是這樣。

en: And I say to you: whoever divorces his wife, except for sexual immorality, and marries another, commits adultery."
zh: 我告訴你們，凡休妻另娶的，如果不是因為妻子不貞，就是犯姦淫了。”

en: The disciples said to him, "If such is the case of a man with his wife, it is better not to marry."
zh: 門徒對他說：“夫妻的關係既然是這樣，倒不如不結婚了。”

en: But he said to them, "Not everyone can receive this saying, but only those to whom it is given.
zh: 耶穌對他們說：“這話不是每個人都能領受的，只有賜給誰，誰才能領受。

en: For there are eunuchs who have been so from birth, and there are eunuchs who have been made eunuchs by men, and there are eunuchs who have made themselves eunuchs for the sake of the kingdom of heaven. Let the one who is able to receive this receive it."
zh: 有些人是生來就不能結婚的，有些人不能結婚是因為人使他們這樣，也有些人是為了天國的緣故自願這樣的。誰能領受就領受吧！”

en: Then children were brought to him that he might lay his hands on them and pray. The disciples rebuked the people,
zh: 那時，有人帶了小孩子到耶穌面前，求他給他們按手祈禱，門徒就責備那些人。

en: but Jesus said, "Let the little children come to me and do not hinder them, for to such belongs the kingdom of heaven."
zh: 但耶穌說：“讓小孩子到我這裡來，不要禁止他們，因為天國是屬於這樣的人的。”

en: And he laid his hands on them and went away.
zh: 於是他給他們按手，然後離開那裡。

en: And behold, a man came up to him, saying, "Teacher, what good deed must I do to have eternal life?"
zh: 有一個人前來見耶穌，說：“老師，我要作甚麼善事，才可以得著永生？”

en: And he said to him, "Why do you ask me about what is good? There is only one who is good. If you would enter life, keep the commandments."
zh: 耶穌說：“為甚麼問我關於善的事呢？只有一位是善的。如果你想進入永生，就應當遵守誡命。”

en: He said to him, "Which ones?" And Jesus said, "You shall not murder, You shall not commit adultery, You shall not steal, You shall not bear false witness,
zh: 他問：“甚麼誡命？”耶穌回答：“就是‘不可殺人，不可姦淫，不可偷盜，不可作假證供；

en: Honor your father and mother, and, You shall love your neighbor as yourself."
zh: 當孝敬父母，當愛人如己’。”

en: The young man said to him, "All these I have kept. What do I still lack?"
zh: 那青年對他說：“這一切我都遵守了，還缺少甚麼呢？”

en: Jesus said to him, "If you would be perfect, go, sell what you possess and give to the poor, and you will have treasure in heaven; and come, follow me."
zh: 耶穌對他說：“如果你想要完全，就去變賣你所有的，分給窮人，你就必定有財寶在天上，而且你要來跟從我。”

en: When the young man heard this he went away sorrowful, for he had great possessions.
zh: 那青年聽見這話，就憂憂愁愁地走了，原來他的財產很多。

en: And Jesus said to his disciples, "Truly, I say to you, only with difficulty will a rich person enter the kingdom of heaven.
zh: 耶穌對門徒說：“我實在告訴你們，有錢的人是很難進天國的。

en: Again I tell you, it is easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle than for a rich person to enter the kingdom of God."
zh: 我又告訴你們，駱駝穿過針眼，比有錢的人進 神的國還容易呢！”

en: When the disciples heard this, they were greatly astonished, saying, "Who then can be saved?"
zh: 門徒聽見了，十分驚奇，就問他：“這樣，誰可以得救呢？”

en: But Jesus looked at them and said, "With man this is impossible, but with God all things are possible."
zh: 耶穌看著他們說：“在人這是不能的，在 神卻凡事都能。”

en: Then Peter said in reply, "See, we have left everything and followed you. What then will we have?"
zh: 那時彼得對他說：“你看，我們已經捨棄一切跟從了你，我們會得到甚麼呢？”

en: Jesus said to them, "Truly, I say to you, in the new world, when the Son of Man will sit on his glorious throne, you who have followed me will also sit on twelve thrones, judging the twelve tribes of Israel.
zh: 耶穌對他們說：“我實在告訴你們，到了萬物更新，人子坐在他榮耀的寶座上的時候，你們這些跟從我的人，也會坐在十二個寶座上，審判以色列的十二個支派。

en: And everyone who has left houses or brothers or sisters or father or mother or children or lands, for my name's sake, will receive a hundredfold and will inherit eternal life.
zh: 凡為我的名撇下房屋、兄弟、姊妹、父母、兒女或田地的，他必得著百倍，並且承受永生。

en: But many who are first will be last, and the last first.
zh: 然而許多在前的將要在後，在後的將要在前。”
